name: Stuffing & Potato Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Prepare an 8-inch square pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. Prepare the cornbread mix according to package directions. Stir in celery and egg white; set aside.
4. To the mashed potatoes, add 1/2 cup cheddar cheese.
5. In the prepared pan, make 4 alternating rows of potatoes and cornbread mixture.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with remaining cheese over top.
7. Bake for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese has melted.
